subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who is the Most Desired One, Who, through His consummate power, hath caused the pearls of wisdom and utterance to [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را سزاوار بوده و هست که بقدرت کامله لئالی حکمت و بیان را از
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
